_human_review.notes: SA Stage B generated/autolabeled labels were reconciled by Codex for internal benchmark cleanup; project-owner approval is still required before promotion-ready status.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_label_warning_resolution.reason: SA Stage B strict tier was rebuilt from deterministic strict-mode engine findings; raw Azure auto-label warnings no longer describe active must_detect labels. Broader statutory coverage remains in ideal_must_detect for gap review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Non-binding Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of Red Sand Payments LLC by Al‑Meshkat Data Solutions JSC (RGX: AMSD‑21), Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Transaction: Buyer to acquire 80% of Target’s issued shares for SAR 92,000,000; consideration mix 70% cash, 30% earn‑out; completion targeted within 120 days of KMOA non‑objection and RGX pre‑clearance.
Regulatory/Exchange context: Buyer is an RGX‑listed issuer; information herein is non‑public and may constitute MNPI under KMOA market‑conduct guidance until an RGX disclosure is posted.
Security measures: Biometra‑X timekeeping devices remain on‑prem; “genetic” only refers to genetic algorithms in fraud analytics, not genetic data; access is role‑based and logged per Annex D.

Closing conditions: KMOA non‑objection, RGX pre‑approval, clean anti‑bribery and sanctions checks, confirmation that no MAC has occurred due to general political risk insurance pricing or public‑source policy updates.

Financing: Buyer may draw SAR 30,000,000 under the “Sitrah‑Blue” Murabaha facility (Acct: SA** 5  8  6100  00‑7744‑00) from Oasis Islamic Bank FZ; proceeds dedicated to consideration and integration capex.
no export until permit KPDPL‑TX‑  09‑2 4‑A is granted
membership in the Service Workers Association (union)
data not materially relevant to integration will be excluded and masked
only eligibility dates and premium class will be processed
sharing is limited to named insiders
